description_long: This is a robust, cubic wooden storage box with reinforced dark wooden framing and vertical slats on each side. The box features prominent red handprints and streaks on its surfaces, giving it a distinctive, possibly ominous appearance. The top of the box is flat and bordered by a thick frame, with additional handprint markings visible. One side of the box is reinforced with a diagonal wooden plank, adding structural strength and visual interest. The wood appears weathered and matte, suggesting it is designed for durability in urban or industrial environments. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the box is likely intended for floor or ground placement, possibly in garages, alleys, or storage areas.
description: A sturdy, cubic wooden storage box with dark framing and red handprints, featuring reinforced slats and a flat top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the diagonal reinforcement plank and two large red handprints on the main panel.
description_view_1: Side view displays two red handprints and a partial view of the top handprint, with no diagonal plank.
description_view_2: Opposite side to the front, showing the diagonal plank but no handprints on the main panel, only on the top.
description_view_3: Back view features four vertical red streaks resembling claw marks, with no diagonal plank or handprints.
